objective: Turn hook/pacing sample study into reusable writer capabilities instead of loose prompt heuristics.

positive_sample_requirements: Has a clear thesis instead of pure forwarding or recommendation
Contains at least one evidence expansion: result, process, mechanism, comparison, scenario, or checklist
Shows pacing or section-level movement instead of one flat explanatory block
Ends with a judgment, action, boundary, risk, or lift
exclude_patterns: Bare x.com/i/article link wrapper with no thesis
Second-hand packaging with no original angle
Pure hype/result bait without mechanism or judgment

capabilities.job: Break the reader's default frame and expose the real stakes before the article starts.

stable_moves.when_to_use: When the source changes how the reader should interpret a product, trend, or technical choice.
examples: Mamba-2 赢在训练，Mamba-3 却把战场改到了推理
Productive Individuals Don't Make Productive Firms

stable_moves.when_to_use: When the source has a large result but needs credibility repair immediately.
examples: 如何用OpenClaw一个月赚到特斯拉（全路径复盘）

stable_moves.when_to_use: When the source is a release, launch, or feature update and the article should focus on adoption judgment.
examples: How to run subagents in Codex
Claude 给了你 1M Token，但别真的全塞满

stable_moves.when_to_use: When the article works by contrasting two markets, two outcomes, or two status frames.
examples: 龙虾刷屏全中国，硅谷却在打哈欠

stable_moves.when_to_use: When the article saves the reader time by filtering, comparing, or organizing a complicated decision.
examples: 一文讲全：2026香港银行卡开户、转账、投资完整攻略

forbidden_moves: Title as a topic label only
Only naming a person/product without the reason to care
quality_checks: Contains at least one frame break, de-hype move, contrast, adoption judgment, or completeness promise
Makes the reader feel their prior model may be incomplete

capabilities.job: Act as the second attack: define what this piece is really about and why it is not just another release/interview/tutorial.

stable_moves.when_to_use: When the title creates a wide claim and the dek needs to point at the real center of gravity.
When the title is sharp and the dek should convert heat into credible importance.
When the article corrects how readers normally interpret a release, result, or conversation.

forbidden_moves: Mood-only lines with no informational function
quality_checks: States the piece's most valuable judgment
Sharpens rather than summarizes the title

capabilities.job: Open with a frame break, then attach the source identity and the reader stake fast.
stable_sequence: State the default frame or common misread
Attach who said/did it and why that carrier matters
Show the article's real value path
forbidden_moves: Explainer tone before value is established
quality_checks: The first paragraph answers why this is worth reading now
The source identity is clear enough to carry weight
The opening does not read like a neutral summary

capabilities.job: Re-earn attention throughout the middle instead of letting the article flatten into explanation mode.
capabilities.reset_frequency: At least one reset every 2-4 paragraphs
stable_moves: Raise the stakes to workflow/market/role level
forbidden_moves: 4+ consecutive paragraphs with the same explanatory density
Bullet list replacing the actual reasoning
Formatting used without a cognitive shift
quality_checks: Each section changes something: frame, depth, scale, objection, or implication
The article does not feel like one long explain-what-it-is block

capabilities.job: Lift the piece one level higher at the end instead of repeating the thesis or falling into process talk.

stable_moves.when_to_use: When the article starts from a feature/tool but should end at work-method implications.
When the source is a case study and the article should leave a broader operating judgment.
When the article starts from a launch but should end at whether/how to adopt.
When the source is a podcast/interview and the article should leave the reader with a sharper unresolved question.

forbidden_moves: Ending with generic creator slogan that does not carry the piece upward
quality_checks: The last paragraph changes the altitude of the article
The ending leaves judgment, risk, or decision pressure rather than recap

global_anti_patterns: Flat mid-section with no attention resets
Bullet lists used in place of reasoning
Learning stylistic habits from promo wrappers or link shells

writer_policy: Do not learn from excluded whitelist wrappers
Do not bury value in the background section
Do not end on process language

evidence_refs.title: What the Real Fundraise Looks Like: 250 Meetings in 98 Days to $1.5M
How I built 13,000+ pages in 3 hours and grew SEO traffic +466% in 60 days
How to run subagents in Codex
Claude 给了你 1M Token 的上下文，但别真的全塞满
AI内容工厂2.0：我把OpenClaw换成ArkClaw，接管了整个飞书
一文讲全：2026香港银行卡开户、转账、投资完整攻略
Productive Individuals Don't Make Productive Firms
The 5 AI Skills That Will Be Worth $350K in 2027. Right Now, You Have 90 Days to Learn Them.
Most Claude Code problems are not prompting problems. They are systems-design problems.
看完 Mau 把 App 做到月入 2.5 万美元的复盘，最有共鸣的其实就一句话
